name: Pathmark Local App Windows
label: Seasonal banner refinement
release_notes: Refines seasonal banners so they are quieter, textless on working pages, and no longer render an empty panel, while retaining labelled previews on the Theme page.
notes: Seasonal banners are now quieter and shallower on Home, Pathmark Planner, Spending Plan and Meal Plan.
Plain seasonal banners no longer render the glass label panel, preventing the stray text/box issue seen on the Home page.
The Theme page still shows the labelled banner preview, where the seasonal context is useful.
Top page padding has been increased slightly to avoid clipping the signed-in/access cards.
The v0.6.94 section compatibility patch is retained.
